author: Codex
name: SP-1024 9x512 KV4 VectorQK Q1.5 FP32Clip (8xH100 10min, pgut3)
blurb: Improved top-level SP-1024 train_gpt.py run on pgut3 using wallclock warmdown, vector residual controls, per-head QK gain, and fp32-preserved control tensors at export; score is the default final int8+zlib roundtrip metric under the 16,000,000-byte cap.
